providers.description: One of Canada's largest construction and infrastructure development companies. Aecon Buildings Group delivers ICI construction, design-build, and project management services across Ontario — from healthcare and transit to commercial towers and industrial facilities.

Bird Construction is a leading Canadian construction company operating across all major ICI sectors. Delivering complex construction projects including commercial, institutional, and industrial builds throughout Ontario with a strong focus on safety and sustainable practices.

Brampton-based commercial and institutional general contractor specializing in healthcare, education, and municipal construction. Aquicon delivers high-quality ICI projects across the GTA and surrounding regions with a reputation for on-budget, on-schedule delivery.

Kitchener-based ICI general contractor with decades of experience delivering commercial, industrial, and institutional projects across Southwestern Ontario. Ball Construction specializes in design-build, construction management, and stipulated price contracts.

Hamilton-area commercial and institutional general contractor delivering quality ICI construction for healthcare, education, and municipal clients. Known for transparent project management and strong subcontractor relationships throughout the Golden Horseshoe.

Sudbury's leading ICI general contractor serving Northern Ontario's healthcare, education, and municipal sectors. Build North brings Southern Ontario quality to Northern communities, with deep experience navigating remote project logistics and Northern procurement requirements.

Oakville-based construction management and general contracting firm specializing in commercial, retail, and institutional projects across the GTA and Golden Horseshoe. Cooper Construction is known for delivering complex phased renovations with minimal disruption to occupied buildings.

Sarnia-area industrial and commercial general contractor serving Southwestern Ontario's petrochemical, manufacturing, and municipal sectors. Curran brings strong industrial expertise to complex plant turnarounds, new facility construction, and infrastructure upgrades.

Woodbridge-based ICI general contractor with 50+ years of experience in Ontario. Buttcon specializes in complex institutional, healthcare, and transit construction. Known for their collaborative approach to design-build and P3 project delivery across the province.

Barrie-based general contractor serving Central Ontario's commercial, healthcare, and education construction market. Bertram Construction brings local knowledge and province-wide resources to ICI projects from the GTA to Northern Ontario.

Burlington-based heavy industrial and commercial construction firm delivering complex projects in the automotive, chemical, power, and transit sectors across Ontario. Alberici brings international expertise and engineering-grade quality to Ontario's most demanding industrial builds.

Toronto office of the world-renowned Turner Construction. Delivering landmark commercial, healthcare, institutional, and transit projects across the GTA and Ontario. Turner brings global best practices, BIM-driven construction management, and unmatched safety standards to every project.

Toronto commercial and industrial electrician specializing in tenant improvement wiring, emergency lighting, fire alarm integration, and high-bay lighting retrofits for warehouses and distribution centres. ESA-licensed with 24/7 emergency callout across the GTA.

Ottawa-based master plumbing and mechanical contractor serving commercial and institutional clients across Eastern Ontario. Specializing in commercial rough-in, domestic water systems, sanitary drainage, and medical gas for hospitals and clinics. Fully licensed and insured.

Mississauga-based commercial HVAC contractor specializing in rooftop unit installation, split system design, commercial kitchen ventilation, and energy-efficient VRF systems. Serving retail, office, and light industrial clients across the Greater Toronto Area.

Hamilton-based commercial roofing contractor with extensive experience in flat and low-slope roofing systems including TPO, EPDM, and built-up roofing for industrial and institutional buildings. Certified by all major manufacturers. Serving the Golden Horseshoe from Hamilton to Niagara.

Sault Ste. Marie-based structural and industrial welding contractor. CWB-certified for structural steel, marine, and mining equipment fabrication. Serving Northern Ontario's steel, mining, and municipal infrastructure sectors with a fully equipped in-house fabrication shop.

Kingston-area commercial concrete and masonry contractor delivering structural concrete, flatwork, and brick/block masonry for ICI construction across Eastern Ontario. ACI-certified crews with strong track record on municipal, healthcare, and educational facilities.

Cambridge-based industrial millwright contractor serving Ontario's food processing, automotive, and plastics manufacturing sectors. Precision equipment installation, laser alignment, gearbox rebuilds, and planned shutdown maintenance. Rapid response team available province-wide.

Barrie-area commercial and industrial refrigeration contractor specializing in ammonia system service, large-scale cold storage construction, and CO2 transcritical rack installation for grocery and food distribution. Serving Central Ontario with 24/7 emergency breakdown support.

St. Catharines-based boilermaker contractor serving Ontario's power generation, pulp & paper, and heavy industrial markets. Certified for pressure vessel fabrication, refractory installation, and heat exchanger maintenance. IBB Local 85 unionized workforce with an outstanding safety record.

Mississauga-based commercial carpentry and interior systems contractor. Specializing in metal stud framing, drywall, acoustic ceiling grids, and millwork for office, healthcare, and retail tenant improvements. Fast-track ICI interiors across the GTA delivered on tight schedules.

Hamilton-based industrial painting and protective coatings contractor. SSPC-certified applicators for epoxy flooring, intumescent fireproofing, tank coatings, and structural steel painting. Serving heavy industrial, water treatment, and bridge infrastructure clients across Ontario.

Thunder Bay-based pipefitting and mechanical contractor serving Northern Ontario's mining, forestry, and municipal sectors. Process piping, steam and hydronic systems, cryogenic lines, and fire suppression. UA Local 628 unionized with a strong safety culture.

One of BC's largest commercial electrical contractors, founded in 1950. Houle Electric delivers complex electrical systems for healthcare, education, transit, and industrial clients across the Lower Mainland and throughout BC. Specializing in design-build, building automation integration, and mission-critical facilities.

Vancouver-based construction and services conglomerate with over 70 years of Canadian project delivery. Ledcor builds some of Canada's most complex commercial, industrial, and infrastructure projects from BC to Atlantic Canada. Specializing in ICI construction, oil & gas facilities, and telecommunications infrastructure.

Surrey-based commercial roofing contractor specializing in low-slope and steep-slope systems for the Lower Mainland market. TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen, and metal roofing for industrial, retail, and institutional buildings. RCABC member with strong safety record.

Vancouver commercial plumbing and mechanical contractor delivering new construction rough-in, medical gas systems, hydronic heating, and stormwater management for ICI projects across the Lower Mainland. BCWWA member. Fully unionized UA Local 324 workforce.

Burnaby-based commercial HVAC and mechanical contractor serving Metro Vancouver. Rooftop unit installation, VRF multi-split systems, commercial kitchen ventilation, and energy recovery ventilation. Factory-authorized Daikin and Mitsubishi Commercial partner. Energy Step Code compliance expertise.

Edmonton-based construction industry leader with over 100 years of project delivery. PCL builds Canada's most complex commercial, industrial, healthcare, and infrastructure projects. Recognized for innovative construction management, safety leadership, and employee ownership model.

Calgary-based diversified construction company delivering complex projects across Western Canada. Graham specializes in commercial, industrial, infrastructure, and resource-sector construction. Recognized for exceptional project management, safety culture, and community partnerships across Alberta and beyond.

Calgary commercial and industrial electrical contractor specializing in oil & gas facility wiring, hazardous location electrical, substation work, and large commercial tenant improvements. IBEW Local 424 signatory. Serving Alberta's energy, construction, and municipal sectors.

Edmonton commercial and industrial HVAC contractor serving Alberta's healthcare, education, and industrial sectors. Chiller plant commissioning, BAS integration, industrial process heating, and commercial ventilation design. Carrier factory-authorized service centre. 24/7 emergency response.

Calgary commercial roofing contractor with extensive experience in the challenging Alberta climate. Flat and low-slope roofing, steel cladding, and spray polyurethane foam for industrial, commercial, and institutional buildings. 24-hour emergency leak response across Southern Alberta.

Employee-owned Canadian general contractor delivering commercial, institutional, and industrial projects across Western Canada. Known for an exceptional safety culture, LEED project delivery, and innovative construction management practices.

Regina-based commercial and industrial electrical contractor. Agricultural facility wiring, commercial service upgrades, potash mine electrical, and municipal infrastructure. IBEW Local 2067 signatory. Serving Saskatchewan's energy, agriculture, and construction sectors.

Winnipeg commercial HVAC and mechanical contractor delivering new construction and retrofit services for healthcare, education, and commercial real estate clients. Heat pump systems, commercial refrigeration, and building automation. Strong reputation in Manitoba's institutional construction sector.

Winnipeg-based commercial and industrial electrical contractor. Agricultural processing facility wiring, power distribution upgrades, emergency power systems, and commercial tenant improvements. IBEW Local 2085 signatory. Serving Manitoba's agri-food, manufacturing, and municipal sectors.

Quebec's premier ICI general contractor with over 60 years of construction excellence. Pomerleau delivers complex healthcare, institutional, transit, and commercial projects from Quebec City to the rest of Canada. Known for innovation in sustainable construction, BIM implementation, and prefabrication.

Montreal commercial and industrial electrical contractor. High-voltage installations, emergency power systems, data centre wiring, and building automation integration. RBQ-licensed with IBEW Local 568 workforce. Serving Quebec's healthcare, commercial real estate, and manufacturing sectors.

Montreal commercial plumbing and mechanical contractor. Institutional plumbing, medical gas, fire protection rough-in, and process piping for healthcare, education, and industrial clients across greater Montreal and the Quebec corridor.

Halifax-based Atlantic Canadian operations of Aecon Group. Delivering complex ICI construction, marine infrastructure, and energy sector projects across Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, and PEI. Strong track record on healthcare, education, and Federal Government facility construction in Atlantic Canada.

Halifax commercial and industrial electrical contractor serving Atlantic Canada. Marine facility electrical, government building upgrades, hospital-grade power systems, and renewable energy tie-in. IBEW Local 625 signatory. Provincial government approved vendor.

Moncton-based commercial plumbing and mechanical contractor serving New Brunswick and Nova Scotia. New construction rough-in, commercial hydronic heating, medical gas installation, and industrial process piping. Bilingual team serving both English and French-speaking communities.
Commercial and industrial electrical contractor based in Calgary. Specializing in oil & gas facility wiring, commercial tenant improvements, and solar PV installations across southern Alberta.

Vancouver-based commercial electrical contractor serving the lower mainland and Vancouver Island. Data centre power, hospital-grade wiring, transit infrastructure, and EV charging station installation.
GTA-based electrical contractor focused on new commercial construction and retail tenant fit-outs. Fast turnaround for landlords and property managers across Toronto, Mississauga and Brampton.
Regina and Saskatoon commercial electricians specializing in agricultural facility wiring, grain handling systems, potash mine electrical, and industrial automation panels.

Manitoba's largest independent commercial electrical contractor. Hospital, school, transit, and heavy industrial projects. CBRN facility clearance. Design-build electrical systems for complex government builds.
Montréal commercial and industrial electrical contractor. Certified for high-voltage distribution, data centre UPS systems, and hydroelectric facility wiring across Quebec. Bilingual team.

Surrey-based commercial plumbing and fire suppression contractor. High-rise mechanical rough-in, medical gas systems, process piping for food manufacturing facilities, and backflow prevention programs.
Edmonton commercial plumbing contractor. New construction rough-in, hydronics, natural gas piping, steam systems for industrial plants, and SAGD facility water management plumbing.
Full-service mechanical contractor based in Hamilton serving the Golden Horseshoe. Process piping, HVAC hydronic systems, domestic water distribution for healthcare and education projects up to $20M.

Quebec City commercial and institutional plumbing and HVAC mechanical contractor. Hospital mechanical systems, arena arena ice plant piping, government facility maintenance, and natural gas distribution.
Calgary HVAC contractor specializing in commercial rooftop unit installation, industrial process cooling, and oil-sands camp HVAC systems. TECA certified. Emergency 24/7 service.
Greater Vancouver commercial HVAC and refrigeration contractor. Data centre precision cooling, VRF multi-split systems, central plant chiller installation, and building automation system integration.
Toronto ICI mechanical contractor. Healthcare HVAC, pharmaceutical cleanroom HVAC, transit station ventilation, and energy retrofit projects across the Greater Toronto Area and southern Ontario.
Saskatoon commercial HVAC contractor. Prairie climate specialists with extensive experience in extreme cold weather systems, grain elevator ventilation, and potash processing facility HVAC.

Calgary commercial roofing contractor. TPO, EPDM, and modified bitumen flat roofing for industrial and institutional buildings. Also specializes in standing-seam metal roofing for agricultural and commercial applications.

Vancouver Island and Lower Mainland commercial roofing contractor. Green roof assemblies, photovoltaic-integrated roofing, and heavy-duty industrial roofing with marine-grade materials for high-rainfall coastal environments.

GTA and surrounding Ontario commercial roofing. Specialize in roof asset management programs, emergency leak response, and full replacement of multi-unit residential and industrial flat roofing systems.
Montréal commercial roofing contractor. Industrial facility reroofing, heritage building restoration roofing, and multi-story condominium flat roofing with thermal imaging inspections.

Hamilton structural and miscellaneous steel fabrication shop. CWB Division 1 certified. Fabricates structural beams, staircases, platforms, and custom industrial equipment for mining, power generation, and heavy manufacturing.

Fort McMurray-based pressure vessel and process piping fabrication. ASME Section VIII shop. Serving oil sands upgraders, refineries, and pipeline terminals with certified pressure welding and NDT services.

Burnaby fabrication shop serving marine, mining, and construction sectors across BC. Structural steel, aluminum marine components, and custom machine guards. CWB W47.1 and W59 certified for complex weld procedures.
Saskatoon fabrication shop serving agriculture, potash mining, and grain handling sectors. Custom augers, elevator legs, hoppers, conveyor components, and trailer chassis fabrication.

Windsor and southwestern Ontario industrial millwright contractor. Equipment installation, precision alignment, conveyor system maintenance, gearbox overhaul, and planned maintenance programs for automotive manufacturers and food processors.
Edmonton millwright contractor serving oil and gas, pulp, and petrochemical sectors. Pump and compressor overhaul, rotating equipment alignment, turbine maintenance, and shutdown planning.

BC pulp, paper, and mining millwright specialist. Conveyor installations, dryer drum overhauls, winder rebuilds, and heavy rigging for sawmill equipment replacement throughout interior and coastal BC.

Calgary process piping contractor. Certified for ABSA-registered pressure piping work on oil refineries, natural gas compression facilities, and heavy oil upgraders. High-alloy and exotic material experience.

Toronto industrial and commercial pipefitting. Steam systems for hospitals, pharmaceutical plants, and food processing. TSSA authorized inspection organization. Hydronic heating and cooling piping for large ICI projects.

Vancouver commercial and industrial pipefitting and mechanical insulation. LNG facility piping, hydroelectric plant penstock work, and refinery shutdown maintenance. BC Safety Authority registered for pressure piping.

Toronto structural concrete contractor. Highrise forming, post-tension slab systems, precast installation, and infrastructure concrete for bridges and transit structures. Large formwork inventory for fast-cycle scheduling.
Calgary commercial masonry contractor. Ground-face concrete block, brick veneer, natural stone cladding, and architectural masonry for industrial and institutional buildings across Alberta.
Surrey concrete and foundation contractor. Deep excavation shoring, caisson drilling, commercial slab-on-grade, and post-tension parking structure construction throughout the Lower Mainland.
Saskatchewan commercial masonry. Agricultural and rural facility concrete block, grain bin foundations, commercial brick, and exterior stone cladding for retail and institutional clients.
Edmonton industrial coating contractor. Epoxy flooring, corrosion-protective coatings for petrochemical tanks and vessels, thermal spray coatings, and abrasive blasting to SSPC standards.

Montréal commercial and institutional painting contractor. New construction drywall finishing and painting, heritage building restoration, and hospital HIQA-compliant coatings. Bilingual team with LEED-friendly low-VOC product lines.

Vancouver industrial spray painting and fireproofing contractor. Intumescent fire protection coatings for structural steel, urethane lining for water and waste management facilities, and epoxy flooring for food-grade environments.

Ontario industrial maintenance painting contractor. Tank farm coatings, bridge repainting, wastewater treatment plant lining, and large-scale commercial repaints. NACE and SSPC certified inspectors on staff.
Calgary commercial refrigeration contractor. Grocery store rack systems, cold storage walk-in coolers, blast freezer installation, and food distribution centre refrigerated dock door systems.
Vancouver and Lower Mainland commercial refrigeration specialist. Natural refrigerant CO2 and ammonia systems for food retail, ice arena plant maintenance, and pharmaceutical cold chain storage.

Toronto commercial and industrial refrigeration. Ammonia and Freon system design-build, arena refrigeration plant overhauls, pharmaceutical vault refrigeration, and 24/7 emergency refrigeration repair across the GTA.

Ottawa commercial carpentry and millwork contractor. Custom cabinetry, architectural millwork, commercial storefront framing, and acoustic ceiling systems for office, hospitality, and healthcare interiors.

Greater Vancouver commercial framing and rough carpentry contractor. Wood-frame multi-unit residential up to 6 storeys, light-frame commercial, and mass timber (CLT/GLB) construction. UBC advanced framing certified.
Edmonton interior carpentry and fit-out contractor. Commercial tenant improvements, hotel room packages, acoustic wall systems, and furniture installation. Fast turnaround on retail rollout programs.
Calgary-based ICI general contractor with a strong track record in oil & gas facility construction, recreational and civic facilities, and complex industrial builds across Alberta and BC.
Vancouver Island institutional and healthcare general contractor. Hospital expansions, long-term care facilities, and school construction across Vancouver Island and the Gulf Islands.
Regina and Saskatoon ICI general contractor. Potash mine surface facility construction, agricultural processing plants, government institutional builds, and First Nations community projects.

Montréal ICI general contractor. Major healthcare, educational, and industrial construction in Quebec. Experienced with RQIH-accredited hospital construction, LEED Gold certification, and bilingual project delivery.
Winnipeg commercial general contractor. Manitoba Hydro facility upgrades, Indigenous community housing and commercial projects, government tender work across Manitoba and northwestern Ontario.
Halifax ICI general contractor specializing in Department of National Defence base infrastructure, healthcare facilities, and port and marine facility construction across Atlantic Canada.

Toronto commercial sheet metal contractor. Custom ductwork fabrication, kitchen exhaust and makeup air systems, laboratory fume hood exhaust, and architectural metal cladding. SMACNA certified fabrication shop.

Vancouver commercial sheet metal contractor. HVAC ductwork, architectural metal wall panels, metal roofing for commercial and industrial buildings, and stainless steel custom fabrication for food processing facilities.

Edmonton industrial sheet metal and custom HVAC fabrication. Process ventilation for mining and petrochemical facilities, stainless and acid-resistant ductwork for chemical plants, and corrosion-resistant exhaust systems.
Heavy Iron Inc. provides professional moving and equipment rigging services in the Ottawa area.
